name: Black Radish Creamery Cheese Shop
notes: Central Ohio's cut-to-order specialty cheese shop inside historic North Market. Unparalleled artisanal cheese selection from around world. Passionate cheesemongers who are also cheesemakers - only ones in Columbus with both titles. Perfect venue for Georgian artisan cheeses.

name: Weiland's Market
notes: Proud member Ohio Cheese Guild. Promotes local cheesemakers with variety from across state. Features Urban Stead, Blue Jacket Dairy, Marchant Manor, others. Always looking for new products from local cheesemakers. Premium international gourmet positioning perfect for Georgian artisan cheeses.

name: Marchant Manor Cheese
notes: Only cheesemaker+cheesemonger in Cleveland. European-style shop in converted bank. Features fellow Ohio artisan cheesemakers. Curates unique domestic varieties. Perfect venue for introducing artisan Georgian cheeses to Cleveland market.

name: The Cheese Shop West Side Market
brandName: The Cheese Shop West Side Market
notes: 175+ traditional & rare cheeses at historic West Side Market Cleveland. Impressive imported & domestic selection. Excellent customer service, exceptional quality. Sample before purchasing. Cut to order. Cleveland's most famous public market.

name: Lindey's

name: Hansa Import House
